{{Quote|'''Dragons!''' A whole blasted '''army''' of 'em! It's a full-scale '''attack!'''|Ship-dweller lookout|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 13">[[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Drexel''' took place just after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was fought between the [[ship-dweller]]s of the [[Great Ship]] and the [[Dragon Lords]], exiles from the city-ship that took command of the [[sea-dragon]]s of [[Drexel/Legends|Drexel]].

The battle resulted in victory for the Dragon Lords and major damage to the city-ship. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] participated in the battle and later engaged in a space skirmish with the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]].

==Background==
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] left for a scouting mission to find a new place for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base, along with the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. During his search, Skywalker stumbled upon the Drexel system. He attempted to tell Princess Leia Organa about it, but his transmission was interrupted, so the Princess decided to find Skywalker by herself and was captured by the pirate [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]].

Skywalker was found by the ship-dwellers and became their Master Machinesmith. Not long after, the smuggler [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was also captured while returning from [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]]. By telling Crimson Jack about a secret treasure, they persuaded him to go to the Drexel system. While on the surface of Drexel, Skywalker was captured by the [[ship-dweller]]s and learned that his ship was brought down by a powerful sonic-jammer. Soon, Crimson Jack's refitted [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] entered the system. While it was disabled by the sonic-jammer, Solo, Organa, and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] managed to escape on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

==The battle==
As they landed, a full scale battle began between dragon lords and ship-dwellers. One skimmer shot at the ''Millennium Falcon'', but Skywalker destroyed it. After that, Chewbacca tried to kill Luke Skywalker, suspecting that he was the one who was shooting at the ''Falcon'', but R2's extinguisher calmed the Wookiee. Meanwhile, Leia Organa was captured by the city-ship governor [[Quarg]], and Han Solo was rescued by the Dragon Lords. One of them explained to Solo that the sonic-jammer caused the sea-dragons to go mad.

Meanwhile, by threatening Organa's life, Quarg made Skywalker connect the ''Falcon''{{'s}} power to the sonic-jammer and the sea-dragons began to die. While the governor was busy, Solo, who arrived on a sea-dragon, used a gun system to destroy the sonic-jammer. While on the city-ship, Organa escaped with the help from Chewbacca and Luke Skywalker. Unfortunately, as soon as the ''Falcon'' was repaired, [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack's]] fighters arrived from orbit. The battle, for the Rebels at least, soon continued in space.

==Space battle==
Solo and Skywalker managed to destroy two fighters, but the female pirate [[Jolli]] damaged the ''Falcon''{{'s}} [[gyro control module]] before being hit and sent out of control. While trying to convince Solo to surrender, Jack found that the smuggler had erased all his navicomputer charts. The pirate agreed to meet Solo in open space, protected only by the magnetic field from Jack's battlecruiser and trade a Gyro Control Module for the charts. Jolli also asked for Jack's help, but he dismissed her, leaving her abandoned.

However, during the exchange, Jack betrayed Solo, called his thugs and sealed the magnetic field between Solo and the ''Falcon''. Solo was forced to make a last stand, but he was assisted by an enraged Jolli, who returned to kill all the pirates, except Jack himself, and cut into the battlecruiser's control bridge. Using this distraction, Solo killed [[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack]] with a shot in the chest. After giving Jolli her first and last kiss and repairing the ''Falcon'', Solo and the others departed the Drexel system.

==Aftermath==
[[Crimson Jack/Legends|Crimson Jack's]] battlecruiser kept drifting above Drexel, until it was found by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] accountant, [[Mosep Binneed/Legends|Mosep Binneed]]. He also learned that Han Solo was responsible for its destruction, from the ship's log. Because Jabba had helped to refit that battlecruiser, the bounty which had been taken off of Han's head after the [[Orleon]] incident, was reinstated. That bounty that was in time collected by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].
